sides.canvas: createFigmaEngine().compileComponentData rendered by the playground canvas renderer (vendored), deviceScaleFactor 2

scoring.pctExactUnmasked: pixelmatch threshold 0, includeAA true — every differing pixel
scoring.pctAAUnmasked: pixelmatch threshold 0.1, includeAA false — antialiased pixels excluded by the classifier
scoring.pctAAMasked: the AA point with BOTH sides' DOM text rects (+4 device px) removed from numerator and denominator
scoring.sizePolicy: content-trimmed crops center-padded onto the UNION canvas; a size delta stays in the diff (never cropped to match)

cells.note: CANVAS SIDE (NEARLY) BLANK: canvas ink 0% vs real ink 54.85% of the union canvas — the masked % understates the miss; CONTRACT/EMITTER GAP (channel table: fill/radius match): the img part is not in the compiled spec (raster content has no canvas projection) and the root carries width but no height — the canvas draws a white-on-white box with nothing visible; realPx quotes the real 24-80px CSS card
